title: Oman Iran Strait of Hormuz transit
snippet: Oman & Iran discuss Strait of Hormuz transit amid ceasefire doubts.

title: WSJ: US and Iran positions too far apart for ceasefire before deadline
snippet: US and Iran positions remain too far apart for a ceasefire before Trump's deadline.

title: Iran rejects ceasefire via IRNA BREAKING
snippet: Iran rejects ceasefire via IRNA, conveying response to US via Pakistan. Emphasizes necessity of permanent end to the war.

title: Ghalibaf REJECTS Trump deal BREAKING
snippet: Adviser to Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf REJECTS Trump deal. BREAKING NEWS.

title: Axios: Trump may delay Iran infrastructure attacks if real deal signs
snippet: Trump may delay attacks on Iranian infrastructure if he sees real signs of a deal.

title: Iran rejects Trump peace deal adviser warns 20 hours to surrender BREAKING
snippet: Iran rejects Trump's peace deal. Adviser warns Trump has '20 hours' to surrender — or allies face 'back to the Stone Age'.

title: Trump may delay Iran strikes if deal signs seen KALSHI
snippet: Trump to reportedly 'delay' attacks on Iran if he sees signs of a deal

title: US doubts Iran deadline extension negotiating tactic Axios analysis
snippet: US doubts Iran deadline extension as tough response seen as negotiating tactic. US signals fading patience but keeps door open to last-minute deal.

title: Axios Trump may hold off strikes extend deadline if deal seen BREAKING
snippet: Trump may hold off on tomorrow's strikes against civilian infrastructure in Iran and extend deadline if he sees deal coming together, defense official says.

title: WTI oil $115.50/barrel now up 110% since Dec 2025 low BREAKING
snippet: US oil prices extend gains to $115.50/barrel, now up +110% since the December 2025 low. Inflation expectations are rising.

title: ROBO Put/Call Ratio 1.0 highest in 20 years fear rising
snippet: Fear among retail investors rising: ROBO Put/Call Ratio at 1.0, highest in at least 20 years.

title: Gold avg $361B/day in 2025 nearly 3x 2021 major assets
snippet: Gold now trades more than most major assets: avg $361B/day in 2025, nearly 3x 2021.

title: Iran delivered 10-point response to US 15-point peace plan BREAKING
snippet: Iran delivered its '10-point' response to US '15-point peace plan.' Points: 1. Guarantee Iran won't be attacked again 2. Permanent end to war, not ceasefire 3. End Israeli strikes in Lebanon

title: Trump military news conference tomorrow 1PM ET 3 hours after deadline BREAKING
snippet: Trump will hold military news conference tomorrow 1PM ET — 3 hours after 48-hour Iran warning expires. Declares Tuesday 'power plant and bridge day.'

title: OPEN THE F****N STRAIT threatens Iran living in hell BREAKING
snippet: Trump: 'OPEN THE F****N STRAIT' — threatens Iran with 'living in hell' if Strait of Hormuz not opened. Declares Tuesday 'power plant and bridge day.'

title: I want to seize Iran oil its there for the taking
snippet: Trump: 'I want to seize Iran's oil. It's there for the taking. There's not a thing they could do about it.'

title: Trump considers charging tolls for ships passing through Strait of Hormuz
snippet: Trump considers charging tolls for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Trump rejects ceasefire he proposed to Iran BREAKING
snippet: BREAKING: Donald Trump rejects ceasefire he proposed to Iran.

title: Both US and Iran reject ceasefire proposal terms Argus Media
snippet: Both US and Iran reject ceasefire proposal terms. Trump insists on Hormuz free passage.

title: Every bridge in Iran will be decimated power plants out of business
snippet: Trump: 'Every bridge in Iran will be decimated by 12 o'clock tomorrow night, every power plant will be out of business.'

title: Iran rejects 45-day ceasefire wants permanent end to war
snippet: Iran rejects 45-day ceasefire proposal — wants permanent end to the war.

title: Iran views Strait of Hormuz as crucial bargaining chip analysis
snippet: Iran views the war and Strait of Hormuz as crucial bargaining chip to extract concessions from Washington.

title: Asia-Pacific markets open higher ceasefire hopes mixed
snippet: CNBC: Asia-Pacific markets set to open higher as investors assess mixed messaging on Iran war. Trump renewed threat to target civilian infrastructure if no peace deal in <24hrs.

title: US stocks whipsaw ceasefire doubts Iran strikes escalation
snippet: US stocks whipsaw as Trump warns Iran strikes could escalate by Tuesday — casting doubt on ceasefire hopes.

title: BBC Trump threatens take out Iran in one night Hormuz deadline
snippet: BBC News: Trump threatens to take out Iran in 'one night' if no deal before Tuesday deadline. Wants Tehran to reopen Strait of Hormuz.

title: Russia demands US drop ultimatums offers mediation Isfahan flop
snippet: Russia Demands US Drop Ultimatums Offers Mediation; Iran Rejects US Ceasefire Terms; US Isfahan Flop.
